caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" and a logo printed on it, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones, sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, which he holds near his mouth. He wears gold necklaces and a watch on his left wrist. In the background, a white wall features yellow text and star graphics, and a screen displays the word "ROSS" and "TALK 101". On-screen overlays include logos for "ROSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and "ROSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man is speaking; he begins with a slight smile and an open mouth, then closes his mouth and tilts his head slightly while continuing to speak. His posture remains consistent, and the camera angle is a steady medium close-up throughout.
